accreditation: NAAC accredited, ISO 9001:2015 certified, Pharmacy Council of India approved
vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based School of Pharmacy that others would wish to emulate.
mission_elements: To implement the Outcome Based Education (OBE) model to conform to our belief 'Students Learn What We Teach'.
To encourage and upgrade teachers for innovative teaching skills, research and practice in Pharmacy.
To provide necessary facility, machinery, equipment, atmosphere and ambience that would enable quality academics, research and practice in Pharmacy.
To create an eco-system for professional competition and reward mechanism.
To prepare and encourage students for direction and career of their choice. Be it higher studies, entrepreneurship, employment, research and innovations.

admission_process.dpharm: H.S.C. with PCB / M or equivalent examination.
admission_process.bpharm_first_year: H.S.C. in PCB / M or equivalent with at least 45% marks & Non-Zero MHT-CET / Non-Zero Positive NEET Score.
admission_process.bpharm_direct_second_year: Passed Diploma in Pharmacy with at least 45% marks.
admission_process.mpharm: B.Pharm with at least 55% marks & Non-Zero Positive GPAT Score.

highlights: 3 students placed at D-Mart Pvt. Ltd. (Pharmacy), Mumbai.
6 students placed at Zeno Health, Mumbai.
4 students placed as Pharmacist Counsellors at Trumed Pvt. Ltd.
skill_development: 38 S.Y.D.Pharm students completed Coursera project on resume and cover letter building.
43 students completed three-month internships in community pharmacy.

library: Access to central KRRC library with extensive pharmaceutical resources.
scholarships: Same as engineering school – DTE Minority, EBC, Central Govt, State Reserved, Girls scholarship (page 52).

contact.address: Plot # 2 & 3, Sector-16, Near Thana Naka, Khandagaon, New Panvel, Navi Mumbai – 410206
